location: 1122 N Milpas St, Santa Barbara, CA
crs: EPSG:26911 (m), vertical NAVD88 m -> reported ft

dem.value: USGS one meter x25y382 CA Montecito (1.0 m)

audience_facing_az_deg.note: from OSM stage rectangle orientation + seating side; consistent w/ DEM fall line

stage_frontage_ft.note: inferred: deck west-edge span read from hillshade/imagery; OSM house long dim 125 ft is the upper bound incl. wings

stage_depth_ft.note: inferred: performance deck depth unknown; OSM house short dim 79 ft includes backstage; 2002 rebuild total 10,000 sqft stage+backstage bounds it

stage_front_to_row1_ft.note: digitized 2026-06-12 from DEM centerline profile fine structure + hillshade ring reads; row1 = first riser, seating_top = upper concourse bench at ~248 ft elev

fan_angle_deg.note: angular extent (2-98 pct) of mid-bowl contour about stage-front anchor (anchor center inferred); imagery read was 140 deg

inner_radius_ft.note: row-1 distance from stage-front arc center; contour check r(row1+2ft) = 43.4 ft

outer_radius_ft.note: top-of-seating distance on centerline; contour check r(top-2ft) = 212.3 ft

upper_row_distance_ft.note: stage front -> top seating row, on axis

row1_arc_length_ft.note: measured fan x row-1 radius (anchor center inferred)

row_count_est.value: ~30-40 bench rows in 3 banks (A-C / D-I / J-O)
row_count_est.note: inferred: imagery terrace texture + published section bands; 1 m DEM cannot resolve individual ~1 ft risers

ada.value: main cross-aisle visible ~ring 30 m + concourse at top of bowl; ADA platform added 2003 (published); switchback access roads N and S of bowl

backdrop.value: audience faces ~E into canyon hillside (oak woodland) behind stage house; enclosed canyon venue with tall stage house + roof
